overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxurious modern penthouse in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring outdoor terraces with wooden pergolas, glass-roofed walkways, and high-tech interior spaces. The camera moves smoothly through the environment, transitioning from outdoor areas with city views to indoor atriums with water features, finally entering a security control room.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury terrace with wooden pergola overlooking city

events.description: moving from under wooden pergola to open terrace edge with glass railing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a modern terrace with overhead wooden slats, approaching a glass railing with panoramic city views

entered.detail: overhead wooden slats creating striped shadow patterns on the terrace floor
transparent glass barrier along the terrace edge with metal frame
futuristic cityscape with tall skyscrapers and holographic advertisements
dark wall with illuminated circular Arasaka corporation logo
potted plants and greenery arranged along the terrace perimeter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a wooden pergola with sunlight streaming through slats, casting striped shadows on the terrace floor. The camera moves forward toward a glass railing revealing a sweeping view of a futuristic city skyline, with the Arasaka logo visible on a nearby wall.

events.description: entering covered interior space with diffused natural light filtering through glass ceiling panels
passing large structural support column temporarily blocking view of the corridor

agents.ego_description: transitioning from outdoor terrace into a covered interior walkway with glass roof structure and metal columns

entered.detail: grid-patterned glass ceiling allowing natural light to filter into the corridor
large vertical structural column with fluted texture
dark paneled wall with vertical lines and recessed lighting
large window revealing interior office space with visible furniture

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway with a grid-patterned glass ceiling that diffuses the afternoon light. Moving past structural columns, the scene transitions to an interior corridor with dark paneled walls, where a glass railing now appears on the left side overlooking the terrace below.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior atrium with water features and zen garden

events.description: entering large open atrium with indoor water pool and decorative rock garden
passing by office window with visible occupant working at desk inside

agents.ego_description: walking through a spacious interior atrium with reflective water features, glancing at an office window with a person inside

notable_agents.action: person sitting at desk visible through office window, appearing to work on computer terminal

entered.detail: rectangular reflecting pool with dark water surface mirroring the ceiling
large decorative rock placed on white gravel bed in the water feature
glass and metal walkway on the upper level spanning the atrium
glass and metal safety railing along the atrium edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a grand atrium featuring a serene water pool with a zen rock garden at its center. Sunlight streams through the glass ceiling creating reflections on the water surface. The camera passes an office window where a person is visible working inside, then continues toward an elevator area with an upper walkway visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: security control room with holographic displays

events.description: approaching elevator bank with dark walls and red emergency equipment
entering high-tech security room with holographic monitors and red carpet

agents.ego_description: walking toward an elevator area then entering a secure control room with monitoring equipment and holographic displays

entered.detail: polished metal elevator doors with vertical brushed finish and gold trim
bright red wall-mounted fire safety equipment in glass case
large dark desk with holographic interface and scattered papers
multiple floating holographic displays showing data readouts and security feeds
abstract circular artwork with orange and blue tones on dark wall
vibrant red carpet runner leading to the security desk area

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a darker corridor toward an elevator bank, passing a red fire extinguisher mounted on the wall. The camera then enters a high-tech security control room featuring a large desk with holographic interfaces, multiple floating data screens, and a striking red carpet contrasting with the dark interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched outdoor terrace into the high-tech, secluded depths of a corporate security hub. It begins under a wooden pergola where striped shadows fall across the floor, moving forward toward a glass railing that reveals a sweeping futuristic skyline and the Arasaka logo. As the camera enters a covered walkway with a grid-patterned glass ceiling, the bright afternoon light diffuses, transitioning the scene into an interior corridor with dark paneled walls. The path then opens into a grand atrium centered around a serene water pool and zen rock garden, passing a glimpse of an office worker before heading toward an elevator area. Finally, the camera glides through a dim corridor past a red fire extinguisher and enters a security control room filled with holographic interfaces and floating data screens atop a striking red carpet.
